case_title: NEXT LEVEL STRATEGIES, INC. VS. PINO SPINOSO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,333.75 FILED BY NEXT LEVEL STRATEGIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPINOSO, GIUSEPPE AKA:  PINO SPINOSO BELDEN RESTAURANT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVIC FEE $50.00) SERVED OCT-18-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPINOSO, GIUSEPPE AKA:  PINO SPINOSO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO DEC-19-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS GOING FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM AND SERVE ALL DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR HIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM. DISMISSING BELDEN RESTAURANT GROUP AND ADDING THE CORRECTED NAME OF THE BUSINESS TO 318 KEARNY STREET LLC DBA PACHINO. ALSO CHANGING THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT'S NAME PINO SPINOSO TO GIUSEPPE SPINOSO. THE AMOUNT HAS ALSO BEEN DECREASED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEXT LEVEL STRATEGIES, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEXT LEVEL STRATEGIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BELDEN RESTAURANT GROUP
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,695.00 FILED BY NEXT LEVEL STRATEGIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPINOSO, GIUSEPPE AKA:  PINO SPINOSO 318 KEARNY STREET LLC DBA PACHINO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *AMENDED* (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED NOV-21-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT 318 KEARNY STREET LLC DBA PACHINO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *AMENDED* (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED NOV-21-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPINOSO, GIUSEPPE AKA:  PINO SPINOSO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEXT LEVEL STRATEGIES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEXT LEVEL STRATEGIES, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SPINOSO, GIUSEPPE AKA:  PINO SPINOSO 318 KEARNY STREET LLC DBA PACHINO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEXT LEVEL STRATEGIES, INC.
ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS:THE REQUEST IS DENIED. - JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL -
